title: Have Questions? We're Here.
subtitle: Our team is ready to help you plan your book launch strategy and get the most from BookProof.

email.title: Email Support
email.description: Send us your question and we'll respond within 24 hours with a detailed answer.

support.title: Live Chat Support
support.description: Chat with our campaign specialists for immediate help with your campaign setup or questions.

sales.title: Enterprise & Custom Packages
sales.description: Publishing house or managing multiple authors? We offer custom packages and dedicated account managers.

languages.title: Supported Languages
languages.description: Our support team can assist you in English, Portuguese, and Spanish — matching your preferred language for a seamless experience.
